description: Pipeline: validate data integrity first, then analyze only if valid
prompt: I have this inventory data: [{"id":1,"name":"Widget A","quantity":50,"status":"active"},{"id":2,"name":"Widget B","quantity":-5,"status":"active"},{"id":3,"name":"Widget C","quantity":30,"status":"unknown"}]. First validate it, then analyze the results. If there are validation errors, include them in your analysis.
